title: Plants vs Brainrots
description: This action game features plants vs brainrots gameplay. Play now on Plants vs Brainrots Unblocked — 600+ free browser games, no download needed.
instructions: Buy a seed and plant it on your land. Move with WASD and jump with Space. Your plants automatically attack incoming Brainrots. Defeated Brainrots go to your inventory — place them on pedestals to generate cash. Spend money on better seeds and unlock more pedestals. Click the Fuse Machine to combine plants and brainrots for rare hybrids. Rebirth to unlock permanent multipliers. On mobile use the virtual joystick to move and tap to interact.
